title: aconitum nagarum f. ecalcaratum
intro: Aconitum nagarum f. ecalcaratum, also known as a variant of the Aconitum nagarum plant, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its roots and leaves, which contain alkaloids, including aconitine, aconitidine, and aconitine hydrobromide, with aconitine being the primary active compound. The health benefits of Aconitum nagarum f. ecalcaratum include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which make it useful in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, but caution should be exercised due to the plant's toxicity and potential side effects.
